qtype: difference in temperature with negative integers
tex:

\newline

\newline

\newline
\\

\newline

\newline

_rawBody:
At noon, the temperature is 4\textdegree C.\\
At midnight, the temperature is $-9$\textdegree C.

Work out the difference in temperature between noon and midnight.

\AnswerLine[][\textdegree C]

qtype: Venn diagram interpretation and set notation
tex:
The Venn diagram shows the number of students in a class of 40 who study physics ($P$), mathematics ($M$) and geography ($G$).
\newline

(a) Use set notation to describe the shaded region.
\newline

(b) Find $\text{n}((P \cap G) \cup M')$.
\newline

(c) A student is chosen at random from those studying geography.
\newline

Find the probability that this student also studies physics or mathematics but not both.
\newline

content.content:
Use set notation to describe the shaded region.
\newline

\newline

\newline
